--- Thread (12 messages, 2018-05-24) ---
[2018-05-24 03:49] .jrkirby (jrkirby): Recrystalize ( :Green: , 20 supply) Effect
As an additional cost to play Recrystalyze, sacrifice a Drone
Effect: Construct a Gauss Charge and a Lifespan 3 :Lifespan: Doomed Drone

Thinking of submitting this to the 10+ supply contest, thoughts?
[2018-05-24 03:51] masn6811 (Masne98888): fairly strong. i like it
[2018-05-24 03:53] supergreyman (Greyman): Not bad! I think it sounds cool.
[2018-05-24 03:53] supergreyman (Greyman): Is Lifespan 4 Doomed Drone too good?
[2018-05-24 04:00] .jrkirby (jrkirby): Part of the reason why doomed drones are not OP is that they have an opportunity cost, and can only be built when you have gold and energy to spare. And still I've heard the phrase: "He bought more doomed drones, so he's probably winning." Since this lets you 'sell' your drones, I think combined with the full unnerfed doomed drone it would be just a tad too strong. It'd be something you have to get every game, rather than a good tech choice that's good in the right scenarios.
[2018-05-24 04:02] .jrkirby (jrkirby): Maybe the fact that gauss charges are slightly below the power curve in most games means that this isn't an issue and it ought to be 4 lifespan. Without playtesting, I can't know for sure, but my gut tells me that 3 lifespan is more fair and fun.
[2018-05-24 04:04] supergreyman (Greyman): The effect is more like "give your drone 3 turn Lifespan before it dies" than "create a brand new Doomed Drone with Lifespan 3".
[2018-05-24 04:05] supergreyman (Greyman): But yeah, it's hard to tweak things without playtesting. I think that's alright since we got the general idea of how it works.
[2018-05-24 04:05] supergreyman (Greyman): It's certainly interesting.
[2018-05-24 04:07] supergreyman (Greyman): I would say it might even be better than Cluster Bolt if you're going to block with Drones, but usually that would be a pretty bad decision.
[2018-05-24 04:09] supergreyman (Greyman): Another tip: Since spells create golden units, you can use it to give your drones 1 more turn to live before it get slaughtered.
[2018-05-24 04:09] supergreyman (Greyman): Possibly useful when going BP.

[2018-05-24 20:24] kaelii: Alloy Crystalizer: ( 4 :Gold: :Energy: :Conduit: ,  supply 4) :Fragile: 5
Start of turn: Gain :Blue: :Green: 
:Click: pay :Green: :Green: :Engineer: : Gain ? :Gold: , Construct ? Gauss Charges, :Exhaust: 2
[2018-05-24 20:26] swapgo: I don't like my resource generators to turn off, but otherwise it sounds fair-ish?
[2018-05-24 20:27] swapgo: More easier Blastforges why not
[2018-05-24 20:31] kaelii: Most of the time I don't think you really want to be clicking it unless you're over teched in green/blue because you pay GG now and GB next turn while it is off -- but I'm pretty sure it should only make maybe 2 gauss charges or possibly 1-1-1 gauss charges.
[2018-05-24 20:33] supergreyman (Greyman): Is the engineer cost intentional? It looks pretty random.
[2018-05-24 20:36] kaelii: Wasn't entirely sure what I wanted there. Mostly was thinking something besides green.
[2018-05-24 20:39] supergreyman (Greyman): Would probably make the click ability gain 3 :Gold: and 3 Gauss Charges.
[2018-05-24 20:40] supergreyman (Greyman): Turn your resource generator into Zemora!
[2018-05-24 20:40] kaelii: 3 Gauss charges I'd worry about it being a cheap sorta teslacoil then.
[2018-05-24 20:40] kaelii: 8E bt3 teslacoil is probably disgusting.
[2018-05-24 20:41] kaelii: I guess the exhaust and double green requirement would limit that though?
[2018-05-24 20:42] kaelii: Still something like DC -> 1C -> 1C for P2?
[2018-05-24 20:42] kaelii: Or even DC -> 1C -> 1EE
[2018-05-24 20:43] supergreyman (Greyman): It's a weird unit in general.
[2018-05-24 20:45] kaelii: Turn 4 they have 3 engineers, click x2 for 6 gauss charges and 14 gold, Can DDDW or other disgusting things depending on what else is in the set.
[2018-05-24 20:45] supergreyman (Greyman): It's an early econ unit, so creating attack at that stage can be pretty degenerating.
[2018-05-24 20:46] supergreyman (Greyman): Maybe it shouldn't create any Gauss Charge?
[2018-05-24 20:46] kaelii: I don't think it should make an equal amount of gauss and gold certainly. It might be okay for it to make a small amount of gold while making gauss charges.
[2018-05-24 20:48] kaelii: Like if it makes 1 gold you refund part of the engineer cost and the gauss charges are paid for with tech.
[2018-05-24 20:50] kaelii: If you paid 2GGGB for 3 gauss charges thats about as efficient as gauss charge as a unit. If you get 3 gold on top of that it is profit.
[2018-05-24 20:51] kaelii: The click shouldn't be super efficient as it is already slightly more efficient than a blastforge to someone with a conduit.
